task_completion.description: Experiment includes a welcome screen and task-specific instruction screens.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PsychoPy Builder 'Flow' panel at the bottom, there should be a routine for a welcome screen at the very beginning, and instruction routines placed before each of the task loops.

task_completion.description: Stroop task is configured with the correct conditions file and response mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Stroop loop properties with the conditions file set to '.../conditions/stroop_conditions.csv', and the keyboard response component showing allowed keys 'left', 'down', 'right'.

task_completion.description: Flanker task is configured with the correct conditions file and response mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Flanker loop properties with the conditions file set to '.../conditions/flanker_conditions.csv', and the keyboard response component showing allowed keys 'left', 'right'.

task_completion.description: Simon task is configured with a conditions file from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Simon loop properties with a conditions file loaded from '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/'.

task_completion.description: Experiment includes inter-block breaks and a final debrief screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PsychoPy Builder 'Flow' panel, there should be break routines inserted between the Stroop, Flanker, and Simon loops, and a final debrief routine at the very end of the flow.

task_completion.description: The task blocks appear in the exact required order: Stroop, Flanker, then Simon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flow' panel at the bottom of the PsychoPy Builder window shows the loops in the sequence: Stroop -> Flanker -> Simon (from left to right).

task_completion.description: The experiment is saved as cognitive_battery.psyexp in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title bar shows 'cognitive_battery.psyexp' or a file explorer/terminal screenshot shows the file successfully created at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/cognitive_battery.psyexp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PsychoPy application open with components being dragged/dropped or configured in dialog boxes, rather than just a text editor modifying a .psyexp XML file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with actual PsychoPy components.
integrity.visual_evidence: The routines and flow should contain standard PsychoPy icons (e.g., text stimulus, keyboard response, loops) and standard property dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by running a pre-written script to generate the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step construction in the Builder interface, not just a terminal command executing a python script that outputs the .psyexp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is exactly '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/cognitive_battery.psyexp'. The task order must be Stroop, Flanker, Simon. Stroop conditions file: stroop_conditions.csv (keys: left, down, right). Flanker conditions file: flanker_conditions.csv (keys: left, right). Simon conditions file is located in the same conditions directory.
